reports.remarks: National Weather Service survey team determined an EF-1 tornado occurred south of Vanderbilt that resulted in snapped trees and a garage door being partially blown in near Lower Sandy Hollow Road.
North Beechwood Street flooded with water almost halfway up the side of multiple cars. Time from report.
Flooding on I-95 southbound between US 13 and approximately 1.5 miles north. There is a traffic disruption. Time estimated.
Several water rescues reported in the Cheltenham area.
Flooded roadway near the intersection of Bristol Pike and Mill Road.
Corrects previous flood report from 1 SSW Summerdale. Frankford Creek Gauge crested at moderate flood stage.

Several public reports via social media and relayed via broadcast media showing flooded streets and fast flowing water at least 6 to 12 inches deep in the Germantown area of Philadelphia. Several cars floating in water. Reports of basements flooded along Godfrey Avenue. Time estimated.
Report of a water rescue.
Several trees downed across Chester. Time estimated by radar.
Flooding on Schuylkill Expressway/I-76 west of Gladwyne. Seen on DOT traffic cameras.
Large tree limb downed within 8100 block of Pine Road. Time estimated by radar.
Trees down around Tookany Creek Park. Time estimated by radar.
Large tree limb downed near intersection of Jeanes Street and Solly Ave. Time estimated by radar.
Several large tree limbs downed within the 8000 block of Burholme Ave. Time estimated by radar.
Tree limb downed near intersection of Ferndale Street and Rhawn Street. Time estimated by radar.
Downed wires on Althea Ave. Time estimated by radar.
